title: Phase 19 – Read-Only State Snapshot (WHERE_AM_I.json)

integration_points.purpose: Generate synthesized read-only snapshot from authoritative sources
integration_points.notes: ESM, no deps. Optional validations via --validate flag. Adds human_readable_summary.

integration_points.purpose: Minimal Quick Status Check reference under Current Work
integration_points.snippet: npm run state:show  # Generates and displays .automation/WHERE_AM_I.json

integration_points.purpose: Add npm scripts: state:snapshot, state:show, state:show:validate
Phase 19 contract path surfaced in snapshot
Reference patterns for Ajv usage; used only when --validate flag is set

integration_points.notes: Exports loadPhaseState, suggestNextAction, formatHumanSummary for reuse across runtime and scripts.

impacts.ci: none; optional validations triggered only by flag

justification: Addresses 'where am I?' gap with a safe, read-only, regenerable snapshot. Avoids state drift and circular writes while providing immediate value. Adds human_readable_summary and shared state module scaffolding.
rollback: Delete scripts/snapshot-state.js, src/state/phaseState.ts and npm scripts; no persistent data.
